narrative:
Hopewell Township has 2,140 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
